diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+# Model definition

+import torch

+import torch.nn as nn

+import torchvision.models as models

+

+class DomainNetClassifier(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, num_classes=345):

+        super(DomainNetClassifier, self).__init__()

+        # Use ResNet-50 with ImageNet pretrained weights

+        self.backbone = models.resnet50(weights='IMAGENET1K_V1')

+        

+        # Replace the final classifier layer

+        num_features = self.backbone.fc.in_features

+        self.backbone.fc = nn.Linear(num_features, num_classes)

+

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+# Prediction script

+import os

+import torch

+import torch.nn as nn

+from torch.utils.data import DataLoader, Dataset

+from torchvision import transforms

+from PIL import Image

+import pandas as pd

+import json

+import argparse

+from model import DomainNetClassifier

+

+class QuickDrawDataset(Dataset):

+    def __init__(self, txt_file, img_dir, transform=None):

+        with open(txt_file, 'r') as f:

+            self.img_paths = [line.strip() for line in f.readlines()]

+        self.img_dir = img_dir

+        self.transform = transform

+

--- a/requirements.txt
+++ b/requirements.txt
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+# Additional requirements if needed

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+# Training script

+import os

+import torch

+import torch.nn as nn

+import torch.optim as optim

+from torch.utils.data import DataLoader, Dataset

+from torchvision import transforms

+from PIL import Image

+import pandas as pd

+import json

+import logging

+import sys

+from model import DomainNetClassifier

+

+# Set up logging

+os.makedirs(f"logs/iter_{os.environ.get('RAB_ITERATION', 0)}", exist_ok=True)

+logging.basicConfig(

+    level=logging.INFO,

+    format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s',

+    handlers=[

+        logging.FileHandler(f"logs/iter_{os.environ.get('RAB_ITERATION', 0)}/train.log"),

+        logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)

+    ]

+)

+logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

+

+# Define dataset class

+class DomainNetDataset(Dataset):

+    def __init__(self, txt_file, img_dir, transform=None):

+        self.img_labels = pd.read_csv(txt_file, sep=" ", header=None, names=["img_path", "label"])

+        self.img_dir = img_dir

+        self.transform = transform

+
